decisions.briefing: Market is neutral with both indexes barely down, and we have 4 open slots with $105 cash — too low to fund new buys without selling, but the screener shows strong momentum candidates. Adding AAON, QCOM, and VERX from the top of the list to fill slots; existing positions remain within risk limits and no stop-loss or profit-target triggers.

market_education.summary_en: Markets drifted sideways today with NASDAQ -0.1% and S&P 500 -0.4%, reflecting indecision rather than a directional catalyst. With no major macro headlines provided, the muted action suggests traders are waiting on upcoming economic data or earnings. Neutral tape conditions like this typically favor stock-specific momentum trades over broad index exposure.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日美股呈窄幅整理格局,納指微跌0.1%、標普500下跌0.4%,反映市場缺乏明確方向。在缺乏重大宏觀消息推動下,投資者似乎正觀望即將公布的經濟數據及企業財報。此類中性盤面通常較利好個股動能交易,而非大盤指數佈局。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A neutral market is when major indexes move very little in either direction, signaling indecision among investors. In these conditions, broad index trades offer little edge, so active investors often focus on individual stocks showing strong momentum or specific catalysts. Neutral tapes can precede either breakouts or breakdowns, so position sizing and stop-losses matter more than usual.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 中性市場是指大盤指數雙向波動極小,反映投資者觀望態度濃厚。在此環境下,押注大盤指數難以獲利,主動型投資者通常會聚焦於個別具備強勁動能或特定催化劑的個股。中性盤面之後可能出現向上突破或向下破位,因此倉位控制及止損設定比平時更為關鍵。
